mapper.select: select node_id, process_id, node_name, node_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from approval_node where process_id = #{processId} order by node_order asc, node_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into approval_node(process_id, node_name, node_order, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{processId}, #{nodeName}, #{nodeOrder}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
